form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign 11th of 16 at Ascot in the LR Placid Ark November 15 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Luana Miss with 55kg at $61. When resuming last campaign ninth of 14 at Ascot Pa Prelude November 1 over 1100m, 6 len behind Luana Miss carrying 54kg at $101. Has obvious ability and back in grade looks a winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. When resuming last campaign ninth of 14 at Ascot Pa Prelude November 1 over 1100m, 6 len behind Luana Miss carrying 54kg at $101. Has obvious ability and back in grade looks a winning chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Bumped outwards and eased approaching the 200m.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Most recently favourite; won by 3.5 len at this track Mdn March 22 over 1300m defeating Ginger Ted with 58kg at $1.60. The run before that held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on March 12 over 1200m, 0.6 len behind Shilling Lane with 58kg at $4.80. Leading player again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Form hard to fault. Most recently favourite; won by 3.5 len at this track Mdn March 22 over 1300m defeating Ginger Ted with 58kg at $1.60. The run before that held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on March 12 over 1200m, 0.6 len behind Shilling Lane with 58kg at $4.80. Leading player again.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months 5th of 10 at this track Cl3 on March 22 over 1200m, 6 len behind Just Gifted with 58.5kg at $12. Previously second-up ran on from midfield and won by 1.5 len at Belmont Park Mdn September 24 over 1200m defeating Watto's Warrior carrying 58kg at $3.90. Rates highly and is among the leading hopes.

formComments.title: TAB

Rates highly and is among the leading hopes.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign second last in a small field at Bunbury Cl1 November 23 over 1685m, 11 len behind Artistry In Motion with 58kg at $19. Previously first up; fifth of 10 at Northam Mdn July 10 over 1300m, soft track; 6 len behind Diamonds'n'rubies carrying 56kg at $26. Prefer to see how she returns.

formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). First-up. Previously first up; fifth of 10 at Northam Mdn July 10 over 1300m, soft track; 6 len behind Diamonds'n'rubies carrying 56kg at $26. Prefer to see how she returns.

form.formComment: Last start won by 1.0 len at Albany Mdn March 26 over 1100m on a soft track defeating Agent Remington with 56kg at $6.50. The start before that 9th of 11 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on March 5 over 1200m, 6 len behind Peter Gunn with 56kg at $19. Will be around the mark.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). Last start won by 1.0 len at Albany Mdn March 26 over 1100m on a soft track defeating Agent Remington with 56kg at $6.50. The start before that 9th of 11 at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn on March 5 over 1200m, 6 len behind Peter Gunn with 56kg at $19. Will be around the mark.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded and eased over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation seventh of 11 at Ascot Cl1 October 15 over 1500m, 2 len behind Shaula with 57kg at $31. When resuming last campaign sixth of 11 at this track Cl1 May 22 over 1400m, 4 len behind Kimberley Rose with 57kg at $16. Might be better off following this outing.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-0.5). Resuming after a break of six months. Finished off last preparation seventh of 11 at Ascot Cl1 October 15 over 1500m, 2 len behind Shaula with 57kg at $31. When resuming last campaign sixth of 11 at this track Cl1 May 22 over 1400m, 4 len behind Kimberley Rose with 57kg at $16. Might be better off following this outing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Crowded on jumping and slow into stride.
Disappointed for a run over the concluding stages and shifted outwards.
Lay inwards over the concluding stages.
Held up through the early stages of the straight.
Had a tendency to lay inwards in the straight.

form.formComment: Most recently took up a position near the tail 2nd of 10 at this track Cl1 on March 22 over 1200m, 1.1 len behind Roaming America carrying 55.5kg at $10. Before that eased back early on 8th of 10 at Belmont Park Cl1 on March 4 over 1200m, 8 len behind Miss Valmalenco with 56.5kg at $18. One of the best chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(-1). Most recently took up a position near the tail 2nd of 10 at this track Cl1 on March 22 over 1200m, 1.1 len behind Roaming America carrying 55.5kg at $10. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Impeded for clear running from on straightening until passing the 150m.
Raced wide throughout. Raced keenly through the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 9 at Bunbury Cl1 January 26 over 1677m, 6 len behind Maximum Impact with 57kg at $21. Previously first up; fifth of 16 at this track Mdn November 30 over 1300m, 3.5 len behind Seven Candles with 56kg at $101. Faces a tough essay.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Lay outwards rounding the home turn and in the straight.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation tenth of 13 at Geraldton Cl2 November 16 over 1200m, 6 len behind De Grandhomme carrying 54.5kg at $14. First up last campaign fourth of 9 at Northam 3yo Mdn September 4 over 1100m, soft track; 1.0 len behind Eternal Wine with 55kg at $6.50. Will improve on whatever she does in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Carried outwards and bumped on jumping.

form.formComment: At the latest run second last of 8 at Belmont Park Cl1 on March 25 over 1000m, 6 len behind Acorn with 56kg at $151. The start before that 6th of 11 at Geraldton Cl2 on January 23 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Lim's Sarbach with 56.5kg at $13. Well held last time and looks tested again.
